reasoning: Both models skipped the critical PKGBUILD file due to incorrect binary file detection, preventing any meaningful security analysis. No other files were reviewed.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (essential build script) was incorrectly skipped as binary
No review of install hooks, source files, or network/filesystem operations
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (malicious commands, unsafe downloads) were missed

learnings: Fix binary detection: Implement proper MIME/file type checks before skipping files
